## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / internal change
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Build / CI / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build` locally and they pass
- [ ] I added or updated tests where it made sense
- [ ] All my commits are signed off (`git commit -s` — see [CONTRIBUTING](./CONTRIBUTING.md#developer-certificate-of-origin-dco))
- [ ] I updated documentation (README / comments) if behavior changed
- [ ] For a substantial change, I opened a design proposal first and it was agreed
